items.title: For the First Time in Any Legal System, a Country Has Recognized the Legal Rights of Insects to Live, Thrive, and Sue in Court
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: The man who became one of India's greatest stage queens
items.dek: Chapal Bhaduri was Bengal’s biggest stage queen - until women arrived and the spotlight moved on.
items.body: Chapal Bhaduri was Bengal’s biggest stage queen - until women arrived and the spotlight moved on.

items.title: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
items.dek: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.
items.body: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.
